name: BottomTopPlaneService
summary: Service providing methods for reading various properties of the reference planes set in the current document.

methods.name: GetAbsoluteBottomElevation
methods.signature: GetAbsoluteBottomElevation( refElement: BaseElementAdapter, doc: DocumentAdapter, planeProp: BasePlaneReferences, ) -> float
methods.summary: Get the absolute elevation of the bottom plane
methods.remarks: Get the absolute elevation of the bottom plane

params.name: refElement
params.doc: Reference element (empty element if not exist)

returns.doc: Absolute elevation of the bottom plane

methods.name: GetAbsoluteTopElevation
methods.signature: GetAbsoluteTopElevation( refElement: BaseElementAdapter, doc: DocumentAdapter, planeProp: BasePlaneReferences, ) -> float
methods.summary: Get the absolute elevation of the top plane
methods.remarks: Get the absolute elevation of the top plane

params.name: refElement
params.doc: Reference element (empty element if not exist)

returns.doc: Absolute elevation of the top plane

methods.name: GetBottomReferencePlane
methods.signature: GetBottomReferencePlane( refElement: BaseElementAdapter, doc: DocumentAdapter, planeProp: BasePlaneReferences, ) -> BRep3D | Polyhedron3D | Plane3D

params.name: refElement
params.doc: Reference element (empty element if not exist)

returns.doc: Bottom reference plane as Plan3D, BRep3D or Polyhedron3D

methods.name: GetDocumentBottomElevation
methods.signature: GetDocumentBottomElevation( refElement: BaseElementAdapter, doc: DocumentAdapter, planeProp: BasePlaneReferences, ) -> float
methods.summary: Get the document elevation of the bottom plane
methods.remarks: Get the document elevation of the bottom plane

params.name: refElement
params.doc: Reference element (empty element if not exist)

returns.doc: Absolute elevation of the bottom plane

methods.name: GetDocumentDefaultPlanes
methods.summary: Get the default bottom and top plane of the document
methods.remarks: Get the default bottom and top plane of the document

methods.name: GetDocumentTopElevation
methods.signature: GetDocumentTopElevation( refElement: BaseElementAdapter, doc: DocumentAdapter, planeProp: BasePlaneReferences, ) -> float
methods.summary: Get the document elevation of the top plane
methods.remarks: Get the document elevation of the top plane

params.name: refElement
params.doc: Reference element (empty element if not exist)

returns.doc: Absolute elevation of the top plane

methods.name: GetTopReferencePlane
methods.signature: GetTopReferencePlane( refElement: BaseElementAdapter, doc: DocumentAdapter, planeProp: BasePlaneReferences, ) -> BRep3D | Polyhedron3D | Plane3D

params.name: refElement
params.doc: Reference element (empty element if not exist)

returns.doc: Bottom reference plane as Plan3D, BRep3D or Polyhedron3D
